arts.ttl: Former Man City financial advisor on possibility of a second hearing over 115 charges
arts.sum: The fate of Man City hangs in the balance at present as the hearing continues into the 115 charges that have been levied against them. Supporters of other clubs would arguably be cock-a-hoop to see the serial Premier League winners relegated, however, English law dictates that City will remain innocent until proven guilty, and if […] The post Former Man City financial advisor on possibility of a second hearing over 115 charges appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Report: Manchester City now want to sign 'top class' £67m midfielder after Rodri injury
Pep Guardiola has 'RUINED football', claims former Man United and Everton star Tim Howard - as he explains manager's negative impact on the game
arts.sum: The former Manchester United and Everton goalkeeper thinks other teams are trying to copy Guardiola's system and making a hash of it.

arts.ttl: Man City's record without Rodri will give title rivals hope as midfielder ruled out for season
arts.sum: Rodri has been ruled out for the rest of the season with a ruptured ACL, with questions growing over how well Manchester City will be able to handle the midfielder's absence

arts.ttl: Manuel Akanji claims Arsenal are 'always looking for drama' after tense draw
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji has fired a dig at Arsenal after Sunday's tense 2-2 draw in the Premier League, claiming that the Gunners are just looking 'for drama'. We tried, especially in the second half with one man up but it's hard with ten players defending in their own box.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland gets final Premier League ban verdict after Man City vs Arsenal incidents
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was at the centre of several controversial incidents during Manchester City's Premier League clash with Arsenal on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Why Leandro Trossard Wont Miss Premier League Game Despite Man City Red Card
arts.sum: Arsenal will be able to select Leandro Trossard for their Premier League clash against Leicester City on September 28.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Watford - TV channel, kick-off time, live stream details
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news and gossip as Pep Guardiola's side prepare to face Watford in the third round of the Carabao Cup at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: What’s Man City’s record with and without Rodri? Premier League, Champions League
arts.sum: Rodri was forced to leave the game against Arsenal after sustaining an injury that immediately raised concerns at Manchester City. Out of the 260 matches he’s played for the Manchester club, Guardiola’s side has won 74% of their games, drawn 15%, and lost just 11%.

arts.ttl: Gabriel fires warning to Man City and Erling Haaland following controversial celebration
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Gabriel was unaware that Erling Haaland threw the ball at him during Sunday's 2-2 draw with Manchester City, but warned he and his teammates will be 'waiting for them' in the return fixture. Speaking to TNT Sports Brasil, post-match, Gabriel responded to Haaland's actions before issuing a warning to City .
